Title: Failed Veeam Backups for KSS
Notes: The backup job for VMKABDC1 initially failed with a “bad allocation” error related to the disk VMKABDC01_2-flat.vmdk, caused by memory or datastore access issues during data transfer. To resolve the problem, I logged into the ESXi host and verified the VM datastore to ensure all VMDK files were intact, then rebooted both the VM and the Veeam Backup & Replication (VBR) server to clear any memory and transport service issues. After recalculating the VM size in Veeam to refresh disk information, I retried the backup job, which completed successfully. Backups are now running normally without errors, and both the datastore and VM have been verified as healthy.
